name: broker-corrects-then-silent
anchor: Layer 3 #6 (broker silent timing — corrects then never confirms)
rationale: Broker submits intake + makes correction. Vienna asks clarification on the correction. Broker goes silent (no reply). After threshold time, F4.CH chase email should fire requesting confirmation. Layer 3: timing threshold + chase content. LIKELY FRANCO-INPUT-REQUIRED.
notes: Two-event sequence (intake + correction); replay harness drives chase-cron forward to trigger F4.CH.
